answer:
To find the **average stock price in 2019**, divide the total repurchase cost by the number of shares repurchased:

\[
\text{Average Price} = \frac{\$88.6 \text{ million}}{2.1 \text{ million shares}} = \boxed{42.19}
\]

The average stock price in 2019 was approximately **\$42.19 per share**.
